name: rubric rule schema validator accepts a fully populated rule with all section 2.1 fields
command: printf '{"id":"g-ts-001","name":"no-any","description":"x","detector":"x","remediation":"x","source_file":"google/tsguide.yaml","source_namespace":"google","type":"problem","fixable":null,"has_suggestions":false,"deprecated":false,"replaced_by":[],"docs_url":"x","requires_type_checking":false,"recommended":true,"options_schema":{},"messages":{},"severity":"P1","version":"1.0.0","semver":"1.0.0","cost_estimate":{"tokens_per_check":10,"runs_on":["ts"]},"false_positive_log":"x","provenance":[],"controls":[],"rule_state":"warn-only","rule_state_history":[],"legal_review_status":{}}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
